commands.review_summary:
The PR adds a `contracts.sessionAttachments` manifest contract and lets trusted external plugins send active-session attachments, text, or `MessagePresentation` payloads through the session attachment hook.

Reproducibility: yes. for the review finding: source inspection shows the PR passes `hookPolicy.allowConversationAccess` into `sendPluginSessionAttachment`, where it authorizes active-session sends. No current-main bug reproduction applies because this is an additive feature PR.
commands.review_followup: Needs maintainer/security decision on the operator grant semantics plus contributor real behavior proof; this is not a safe automated repair lane because the best fix likely changes public config policy.

target.title: Allow trusted plugin session presentations
